title: Extra Piratery
description: Extra Piratery adds a lot of things to turn you into a pirate. From luxurious golden blocks to new clothes and accessories to new structures to loot.
body:
**Extra Piratery** adds a lot of things to turn you into a pirate. From luxurious golden blocks to new clothes and accessories to new structures to loot.

**[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) is required!**

  Among all the lesser details you will find important features and mechanics like:

- Two new structures to get new loot from found near and in the vast oceans.
- A fair share of new accessories, from simple ones adding a bit of armor, to ones almost making you into a sea creature.
- A new crop used for some viable (and not entirely legal) business.
- A brand new Bootlegger NPC to do shady trades with.
  
Hope you enjoy! :D
